implications.effect: Échec thérapeutique probable — activation métabolique réduite; alternative (prasugrel, ticagrelor) recommandée.
implications.effect_en: Probable therapeutic failure reported — reduced metabolic activation; alternatives (prasugrel, ticagrelor) are mentioned in the literature.

implications.effect: Concentrations plasmatiques augmentées; efficacité souvent accrue mais surdosage possible à forte dose.
implications.effect_en: Increased plasma concentrations described; often greater efficacy but possible overexposure at high doses.

implications.effect: Concentrations augmentées; réduire la dose ou changer de molécule.
implications.effect_en: Increased concentrations described; a dose reduction or alternative agent is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Exposition augmentée; surveillance thérapeutique recommandée.
implications.effect_en: Increased exposure described; therapeutic drug monitoring is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Allèle *3 = perte de fonction; combiné à *2 peut donner PM; alternative indiquée.
implications.effect_en: *3 allele = loss-of-function; combined with *2 may yield a poor metabolizer phenotype; alternatives are mentioned in the literature.

implications.effect: Métabolisme accéléré; efficacité réduite possible.
implications.effect_en: Accelerated metabolism described; possible reduced efficacy reported.

implications.effect: Clairance accrue; efficacité anti-acide réduite.
implications.effect_en: Increased clearance described; reduced acid-suppressing efficacy reported.

implications.effect: Conversion réduite en morphine; antalgie insuffisante.
implications.effect_en: Reduced conversion to morphine described; insufficient analgesia reported.

implications.effect: Activation réduite; antalgie insuffisante.
implications.effect_en: Reduced activation described; insufficient analgesia reported.

implications.effect: Conversion réduite en endoxifène; efficacité moindre en prévention de récidive.
implications.effect_en: Reduced conversion to endoxifen described; lower efficacy reported for recurrence prevention.

implications.effect: Concentrations augmentées; risque d'effets indésirables.
implications.effect_en: Increased concentrations described; risk of adverse effects reported.

implications.effect: Bradycardie/hypotension accrues; envisager bisoprolol.
implications.effect_en: Increased bradycardia/hypotension reported; bisoprolol is mentioned as an alternative in the literature.

implications.effect: Concentrations d'endoxifène diminuées; efficacité réduite.
implications.effect_en: Decreased endoxifen concentrations described; reduced efficacy reported.

implications.effect: Activation partielle; antalgie réduite.
implications.effect_en: Partial activation described; reduced analgesia reported.

implications.effect: Demi-vie prolongée (>5h); éviter après 14h pour préserver le sommeil.
implications.effect_en: Prolonged half-life described (>5h); the literature describes limiting intake after 2 PM to preserve sleep.

implications.effect: Concentrations augmentées; ajustement de dose recommandé.
implications.effect_en: Increased concentrations described; a dose adjustment is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Clairance réduite; surveillance thérapeutique.
implications.effect_en: Reduced clearance described; therapeutic drug monitoring is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Dose d'entretien réduite; risque hémorragique accru; dosage guidé INR + CYP2C9/VKORC1.
implications.effect_en: Reduced maintenance dose described; increased bleeding risk reported; INR-guided dosing combined with CYP2C9/VKORC1 is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Concentrations augmentées; risque de toxicité.
implications.effect_en: Increased concentrations described; risk of toxicity reported.

implications.effect: Exposition augmentée; débuter à demi-dose.
implications.effect_en: Increased exposure described; starting at half dose is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Sensibilité majeure; dose souvent diminuée de 30–50%.
implications.effect_en: Major sensitivity reported; a dose reduction of 30–50% is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Clairance réduite >50%; adaptation posologique stricte.
implications.effect_en: Clearance reduced by >50%; a strict dosage adaptation is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Dose d'entretien souvent réduite; combiner à CYP2C9 pour algorithme de dosage.
implications.effect_en: Reduced maintenance dose often described; combining with CYP2C9 in a dosing algorithm is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Sensibilité accrue; réduire dose initiale.
implications.effect_en: Increased sensitivity reported; a reduced initial dose is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Myélotoxicité sévère; dose à réduire ou alternative.
implications.effect_en: Severe myelotoxicity reported; a dose reduction or alternative is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Myélotoxicité; dose à réduire fortement.
implications.effect_en: Myelotoxicity reported; a substantial dose reduction is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Myélotoxicité accrue; adapter dose.
implications.effect_en: Increased myelotoxicity reported; a dosage adaptation is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque myélosuppression; réduction de dose.
implications.effect_en: Risk of myelosuppression reported; a dose reduction is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Toxicité sévère (muqueuse, hématologique) possiblement fatale; réduire dose 50% ou éviter.
implications.effect_en: Severe toxicity reported (mucosal, hematological), potentially fatal; a 50% dose reduction or avoidance is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Toxicité sévère; adapter ou contre-indiquer.
implications.effect_en: Severe toxicity reported; dosage adaptation or contraindication is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Myopathie/rhabdomyolyse; limiter dose à 20 mg ou changer (rosuvastatine, atorvastatine).
implications.effect_en: Myopathy/rhabdomyolysis reported; a 20 mg dose cap or switch (rosuvastatin, atorvastatin) is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque musculaire modéré; surveiller.
implications.effect_en: Moderate muscular risk reported; clinical follow-up is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Hypersensibilité sévère; contre-indication absolue.
implications.effect_en: Severe hypersensitivity reported; absolute contraindication is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Atteinte hépatique idiosyncrasique; éviter si possible.
implications.effect_en: Idiosyncratic liver injury reported; avoidance where possible is described in the literature.

ref/alt.phenotype_en: HLA-B*15:02 possible (proxy, HLA typing confirmation needed)

implications.effect: Syndrome de Stevens-Johnson/Lyell; contre-indication chez porteurs (surtout Asiatiques).
implications.effect_en: Stevens-Johnson syndrome/TEN reported; contraindication in carriers (especially Asian populations) is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque SJS/TEN; éviter.
implications.effect_en: SJS/TEN risk reported; avoidance is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque SJS/TEN accru.
implications.effect_en: Increased SJS/TEN risk reported.

implications.effect: Hémolyse aiguë; contre-indiqué.
implications.effect_en: Acute hemolysis reported; contraindication is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Hémolyse; dépistage préalable requis.
implications.effect_en: Hemolysis reported; prior screening is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Hémolyse; surveiller l'hémoglobine.
implications.effect_en: Hemolysis reported; hemoglobin monitoring is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque d'hémolyse; prudence.
implications.effect_en: Risk of hemolysis reported; caution is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Neutropénie/diarrhée sévère; réduire la dose initiale.
implications.effect_en: Severe neutropenia/diarrhea reported; a reduced initial dose is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Hyperbilirubinémie; ictère bénin.
implications.effect_en: Hyperbilirubinemia reported; benign jaundice described.

implications.effect: Myélosuppression sévère; dose à réduire drastiquement.
implications.effect_en: Severe myelosuppression reported; a drastic dose reduction is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Myélotoxicité; adapter dose.
implications.effect_en: Myelotoxicity reported; a dosage adaptation is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Exposition augmentée; limiter la dose à 20 mg/j.
implications.effect_en: Increased exposure described; a 20 mg/day dose cap is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Efficacité réduite sur l'uricémie; augmenter dose si besoin.
implications.effect_en: Reduced efficacy on serum uric acid described; a dose increase as needed is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Probabilité de réponse virologique soutenue variable selon génotype.
implications.effect_en: Likelihood of sustained virological response described as variable by genotype.

implications.effect: Expresseurs nécessitent ~1,5–2× la dose standard pour atteindre la cible.
implications.effect_en: Expressers are described in the literature as requiring ~1.5–2× the standard dose to reach target levels.

implications.effect: Pharmacocinétique modulée; variabilité de réponse.
implications.effect_en: Modulated pharmacokinetics described; response variability reported.

alt/alt.phenotype: TT — variant associé à moindre tolérance aux ISRS
alt/alt.phenotype_en: TT — variant associated with reduced SSRI tolerability

implications.effect: Associé à plus d'effets indésirables (nausées, agitation).
implications.effect_en: Association reported with more adverse effects (nausea, agitation).

implications.effect: Tolérance variable.
implications.effect_en: Variable tolerability reported.

alt/alt.phenotype: GG — besoin plus élevé en morphine décrit

implications.effect: Porteurs G : antalgie réduite, titrer selon douleur.
implications.effect_en: G carriers: reduced analgesia reported; pain-guided titration is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Efficacité possiblement accrue chez porteurs G (alcoolo-dépendance).
implications.effect_en: Possibly increased efficacy reported in G carriers (alcohol use disorder).

implications.effect: Efficacité hypotensive variable selon génotype.
implications.effect_en: Antihypertensive efficacy described as variable by genotype.

implications.effect: Toxicité (mucite, cytopénies) possiblement accrue chez T/T.
implications.effect_en: Toxicity (mucositis, cytopenias) reported as possibly increased in T/T.

implications.effect: Supplémentation en folates actifs (L-méthylfolate) parfois recommandée.
implications.effect_en: Active folate supplementation (L-methylfolate) is sometimes described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque thromboembolique accru; privilégier alternatives non-œstrogéniques.
implications.effect_en: Increased thromboembolic risk reported; non-estrogenic alternatives are mentioned in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque thrombotique majoré; évaluer rapport bénéfice/risque.
implications.effect_en: Increased thrombotic risk reported; benefit/risk assessment is described in the literature.

ref/alt.phenotype: Facteur V Leiden hétérozygote — risque thrombotique ×4–7
ref/alt.phenotype_en: Factor V Leiden heterozygous — thrombotic risk ×4–7

alt/alt.phenotype: Facteur V Leiden homozygote — risque thrombotique ×30–80
alt/alt.phenotype_en: Factor V Leiden homozygous — thrombotic risk ×30–80

implications.effect: Risque TVP/EP majoré; contre-indication relative.
implications.effect_en: Increased DVT/PE risk reported; relative contraindication is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Risque thrombotique élevé; éviter voie orale.
implications.effect_en: High thrombotic risk reported; avoidance of the oral route is described in the literature.

implications.effect: Porteurs T : dose d'entretien légèrement augmentée (composante de l'algorithme IWPC).
implications.effect_en: T carriers: a slightly increased maintenance dose is described in the literature (component of the IWPC algorithm).

implications.effect: Acétyleurs lents : hépatotoxicité et neuropathie accrues.
implications.effect_en: Slow acetylators: increased hepatotoxicity and neuropathy reported.

implications.effect: Toxicité hématologique accrue chez acétyleurs lents.
implications.effect_en: Increased hematological toxicity reported in slow acetylators.
